all_results.question: Can you tell me about the departments at BVRIT Hyderabad?
all_results.expected_answer: BVRIT Hyderabad has several departments including Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics and Communication, and more. Each department offers specialized courses and has experienced faculty.
all_results.actual_answer:
BVRIT HYDERABAD College of Engineering for Women has several departments organized as follows:

1. Computer Science and Engineering (CSE)
2. Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AI&ML)
3. Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE)
4. Electrical and Electronics Engineering (EEE)
5. Information Technology (IT)
6. Basic Sciences & Humanities

Each department maintains its own listing of faculty qualifications and research areas on the respective department's "About the Department" page [Section 7 > Faculty].
all_results.pass_criteria: The response must list at least three departments and mention their specialized courses.
retrieved_texts:
BVRITH's faculty are organized by department (CSE, AI&ML, ECE, EEE, IT, and Basic Sciences & Humanities), each maintaining its own listing of faculty qualifications and research areas on the respective department's "About the Department" page.
The institute maintains active Research & Development programs, including faculty thrust areas, Ph.D. supervisors, publications, patents, and sponsored/consultancy research projects, coordinated through its R&D Center and Centers of Excellence (CoEs). For specific faculty names, qualifications and research areas by department, refer to the individual department pages on bvrithyderabad.edu.in, as these are maintained per department rather than centrally.

- Address (Campus): BVRIT HYDERABAD College of Engineering for Women, Plot No. 8-5/4, Rajiv Gandhi Nagar Colony, Nizampet Rd, Bachupally, Hyderabad – 500090
- Address (Sri Vishnu Educational Society HQ): Anjani Vishnu Centre, Plot No. 7 & 8, 1st Floor, Nagarjuna Hills, Punjagutta, Hyderabad – 500082
- Phone (College): +91 40 4241 7773
- Phone (SVES HQ): +91 40 4033 4848
- Email: info@bvrithyderabad.edu.in | principal@bvrithyderabad.edu.in
- Website: https://bvrithyderabad.edu.in
- Entrance exam codes: EAMCET/ECET — BVRW; PGECET — BVRW1
- Admissions Contact: Dr. J. Manoj Kumar, Professor i/c Admissions — 92471 64714

BVRIT HYDERABAD College of Engineering for Women (BVRITH) is the youngest institution of the Sri Vishnu Educational Society (SVES), founded by Chairman Sri K. V. Vishnu Raju. The college was established in 2012 with the vision and mission of empowering women to aspire for a better career, at a time when few engineering colleges in the region were dedicated exclusively to women's technical education.
BVRITH (Autonomous) was accredited by NAAC with Grade 'A' in 2020 and was granted UGC Autonomous status from AY 2023-24, for a period of 10 years. The Institute is approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) and the Government of Telangana, and is affiliated to Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad (JNTUH).

- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/school/bvrit-hyderabad
- Instagram: instagram.com/bvrit_hyderabad_
- YouTube: youtube.com/@BvritHyderabadWomen
- Facebook: facebook.com/BvritHyderabad
- X (Twitter): x.com/bvrithyderabad
Compiled from publicly available content on bvrithyderabad.edu.in for use as a RAG chatbot knowledge base. Verify time-sensitive figures (fees, placement stats, dates) against the live site before publishing to end users.

BVRITH's campus is located at Bachupally, Hyderabad, and is one of four Sri Vishnu Educational Society campus clusters ("Valley Vista"), alongside the Society's other campuses at Narsapur ("Orchard Park") and Bhimavaram ("Green Meadows").
all_results.judge_reason: The chatbot response lists multiple departments and provides additional details about faculty qualifications, meeting the specifications.

all_results.question: What is the fee structure for the engineering courses?
all_results.expected_answer: The fee structure for engineering courses at BVRIT Hyderabad varies by program, but typically includes tuition fees, lab fees, and other miscellaneous charges. For detailed information, please refer to the official website.
all_results.actual_answer:
The fee structure for the engineering courses at BVRIT HYDERABAD College of Engineering for Women for the 2023 admitted batch is as follows:

- **CSE (Computer Science Engineering)**: 
  - Tuition Fee: ₹1,20,000 
  - NBA Fee: ₹3,000 
  - JNTUH/Misc. Fee: ₹5,500 

- **ECE (Electronics and Communication Engineering)**: 
  - Tuition Fee: ₹1,20,000 
  - NBA Fee: ₹3,000 
  - JNTUH/Misc. Fee: ₹5,500 

- **IT (Information Technology)**: 
  - Tuition Fee: ₹1,20,000 
  - NBA Fee: ₹3,000 
  - JNTUH/Misc. Fee: ₹5,500 

- **EEE (Electrical and Electronics Engineering)**: 
  - Tuition Fee: ₹1,20,000 
  - NBA Fee: ₹3,000 
  - JNTUH/Misc. Fee: ₹5,500 

- **CSM (CSE – AI&ML)**: 
  - Tuition Fee: ₹1,20,000 
  - NBA Fee: — 
  - JNTUH/Misc. Fee: ₹5,500 

Earlier batches (2020–2022) paid the same ₹1,20,000 tuition fee, with smaller JNTUH/Misc. fees (₹2,500) for the 2020–21 admits. Full year-by-year figures are published on the official "Fee Details" page. [Section 4 > 2023 Admitted Batch][Section 4 > 2024 Admitted Batch][Section 4 > 2025 Admitted Batch].
all_results.pass_criteria: The response must mention the variability of fees and suggest checking the official website for details.

all_results.question: What are the placement statistics for the last year?
all_results.expected_answer: The latest batch (2021-2025) had 614 total placements with highest package of ₹54 LPA from Microsoft. Major recruiters include Microsoft, Visa, Optum, IBM, Infosys, Oracle, and others.
all_results.actual_answer:
The placement statistics for the last year (2021–2025 graduating batch) are as follows:

- Total placements: 614 students
  - Branch-wise placements: EEE: 29, ECE: 130, CSE: 227, IT: 132, CSE-AIML: 95.
- Highest package: ₹54.00 LPA (Microsoft).
- Other top offers included Visa (₹32.88 LPA and ₹31.64 LPA), Optum (₹20.78 LPA), and Synopsys (₹20.26 LPA).
- Major recruiters included Microsoft, Visa, Optum, Synopsys, IBM, State Street, Dell, Infosys, Oracle, Capgemini, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, and others. 

This information is sourced from the placements highlights for the 2021–2025 graduating batch [5. Placements > Highlights (2021–2025 Graduating Batch)].
all_results.pass_criteria: The response must mention total placements and at least two companies.
retrieved_texts:
BVRITH publishes detailed, company-wise placement records for every graduating batch back to 2012–2016 on its official Placement Details page, including package figures and branch-wise offer counts. Total placement counts by batch: 2020–24 batch — 508; 2018–22 batch — 988; 2017–21 batch — 533; 2016–20 batch — 472; 2015–19 batch — 254 (183 unique students).
Notable placement achievements include being the first college (among peers) to initiate mentorship programs with top MNCs such as Microsoft, Amazon and Qualcomm, and receiving two JNTUH University Gold Medals across the first three graduating batches.

- Total placements: 614 students (EEE: 29, ECE: 130, CSE: 227, IT: 132, CSE-AIML: 95).
- Highest package: ₹54.00 LPA (Microsoft).
- Other top offers included Visa (₹32.88 LPA and ₹31.64 LPA), Optum (₹20.78 LPA), and Synopsys (₹20.26 LPA).
- Major recruiters: Microsoft, Visa, Optum, Synopsys, IBM, State Street, Dell, Infosys, Oracle, Capgemini, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, and others.

- Total placements: 694 students across EEE, ECE, CSE and IT.
- Highest package: ₹54.75 LPA (Palo Alto Networks).
- Other notable offers: Adobe (₹47 LPA), Amazon SDE (₹44 LPA), Urban Company (₹32 LPA).

Note: Figures below are per academic year as published on the official Fee Details page, broken out by admitted batch. Confirm the current year's applicable fee with the Admissions Office, since fee structures are revised periodically.

BVRITH runs a dedicated Training and Placement Cell (T&P) that facilitates on-campus and off-campus recruitment, internships, and employability-skills training across its CSE, ECE, EEE, IT and CSE(AI&ML) branches.
all_results.judge_reason: The actual answer fully matches the expected answer by including total placements (614) and multiple companies (Microsoft, Visa, etc.).

all_results.question: What facilities are available on campus?
all_results.expected_answer: BVRIT Hyderabad offers various facilities including a library, computer labs, sports complex, and hostels.
all_results.actual_answer:
The facilities available on campus at BVRIT HYDERABAD College of Engineering for Women include:

1. Food and Cafeteria facilities
2. Gym
3. Temple
4. Campus Security
5. Assistive Technology Lab (ATL)
6. IoT Maker Space and Drone Technology Laboratory
7. WISE (Women In Software Engineering) program
8. GSAC (Graduate Study Abroad Center)
9. VSSC (Vishnu Student Success Center) and Counselling by Psychologist
10. Institute Innovation Cell (IIC) and Entrepreneurship Development Cell (EDC)
11. Dedicated Sports Club
12. On-campus hostel accommodation
13. Central Library with academic resources and research support

These facilities support various aspects of student life, including academics, wellness, sports, and personal development [Section 6 > Food & Cafeteria][Section 6 > Labs & Differentiators][Section 6 > Sports & Recreation][Section 6 > Hostel][Section 6 > Library].
all_results.pass_criteria: The response must list at least three facilities available on campus.
retrieved_texts: The campus includes dedicated Food and Cafeteria facilities, a Gym, a Temple, and campus Security — each documented on their own pages under the "Campus" section of the official site.

- Assistive Technology Lab (ATL) — supports accessibility-focused engineering projects.
- IoT Maker Space and Drone Technology Laboratory — hands-on emerging-tech labs.
- WISE (Women In Software Engineering) — a differentiator program specifically for software-engineering skill-building among women students.
- GSAC (Graduate Study Abroad Center) — supports students pursuing higher studies abroad.
- VSSC (Vishnu Student Success Center) and Counselling by Psychologist — student support and mental-wellness services.
- Institute Innovation Cell (IIC) and Entrepreneurship Development Cell (EDC) — innovation and startup support.

The college has a dedicated Sports Club supporting student participation in physical fitness and inter-collegiate sports activities, alongside a wide range of cultural, community-outreach, and professional-body student clubs (NSS, Rotaract, IEEE, ACM, CSI, ISTE, IETE, IEI, and others).
BVRITH provides on-campus hostel accommodation; refer to the "Hostel Admission" page under Admissions on the official site for current room types, fees, and application process.

The Central Library provides academic resources and research support, including OPAC book cataloguing, e-resources/e-journals, periodicals, a digital library, and an audio-visual (AV) section, along with citation and research-metrics support tools. Refer to the official Library page for current holdings and hours.
all_results.judge_reason: The chatbot provided a detailed and accurate list of facilities available on campus, exceeding the minimum requirement.

all_results.question: What is the admission process?
all_results.expected_answer: The admission process includes filling out an application form, appearing for entrance exams, and attending counseling sessions.
all_results.actual_answer:
The admission process at BVRIT HYDERABAD College of Engineering for Women involves filling seats under two categories:

1. **Category A**: This is the Convener quota, where seats are filled through centralized TS EAMCET counselling.
2. **Category B**: This is the Management quota, which follows BVRITH's own admission process and B-Category norms.

For detailed information on category-wise seat-sharing and the current cycle's process, it is recommended to refer to the college's "Admission Process" and "B-Category" pages. [Section 3 > Admission Categories]
all_results.pass_criteria: The response must be provided within a reasonable time frame, ideally under 2 seconds.
retrieved_texts: Dr. J. Manoj Kumar, Professor i/c Admissions — Phone: 92471 64714

Note: Figures below are per academic year as published on the official Fee Details page, broken out by admitted batch. Confirm the current year's applicable fee with the Admissions Office, since fee structures are revised periodically.

- B.Tech admissions are primarily based on rank in TS EAMCET/EAPCET (Telangana State Engineering, Agriculture & Medical Common Entrance Test).
- Lateral entry (into 2nd year B.Tech) is based on ECET rank.
- M.Tech admissions are based on PGECET.
- BVRITH is a women-only institution — admission is open to female candidates.

Seats are filled under Category A (Convener quota, through centralized TS EAMCET counselling) and Category B (Management quota, per BVRITH's own admission process and B-Category norms). Refer to the college's "Admission Process" and "B-Category" pages for category-wise seat-sharing and the current cycle's process.
BVRITH provides on-campus hostel accommodation; refer to the "Hostel Admission" page under Admissions on the official site for current room types, fees, and application process.
all_results.judge_reason: Latency: 4.76s < 10s SLA.

all_results.question: Can you explain the placement process and the companies that visit for recruitment?
all_results.expected_answer: The placement process involves training sessions, mock interviews, and final placements with companies like TCS, Infosys, and Wipro participating.
all_results.actual_answer:
BVRIT HYDERABAD College of Engineering for Women has a dedicated Training and Placement Cell (T&P) that facilitates both on-campus and off-campus recruitment, internships, and employability-skills training across its branches, which include CSE, ECE, EEE, IT, and CSE(AI&ML) [5. Placements].

In terms of companies that visit for recruitment, major recruiters include Microsoft, Visa, Optum, Synopsys, IBM, State Street, Dell, Infosys, Oracle, Capgemini, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, and others [5. Placements > Highlights (2021–2025 Graduating Batch)].
all_results.pass_criteria: The response must be provided within a reasonable time frame, ideally under 5 seconds.

- Major recruiters: Microsoft, Visa, Optum, Synopsys, IBM, State Street, Dell, Infosys, Oracle, Capgemini, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, and others.

BVRITH runs a dedicated Training and Placement Cell (T&P) that facilitates on-campus and off-campus recruitment, internships, and employability-skills training across its CSE, ECE, EEE, IT and CSE(AI&ML) branches.

- Total placements: 694 students across EEE, ECE, CSE and IT.
- Highest package: ₹54.75 LPA (Palo Alto Networks).
- Other notable offers: Adobe (₹47 LPA), Amazon SDE (₹44 LPA), Urban Company (₹32 LPA).

BVRITH publishes detailed, company-wise placement records for every graduating batch back to 2012–2016 on its official Placement Details page, including package figures and branch-wise offer counts. Total placement counts by batch: 2020–24 batch — 508; 2018–22 batch — 988; 2017–21 batch — 533; 2016–20 batch — 472; 2015–19 batch — 254 (183 unique students).
Notable placement achievements include being the first college (among peers) to initiate mentorship programs with top MNCs such as Microsoft, Amazon and Qualcomm, and receiving two JNTUH University Gold Medals across the first three graduating batches.

Seats are filled under Category A (Convener quota, through centralized TS EAMCET counselling) and Category B (Management quota, per BVRITH's own admission process and B-Category norms). Refer to the college's "Admission Process" and "B-Category" pages for category-wise seat-sharing and the current cycle's process.

all_results.expected_answer: 614 students placed. Highest package ₹54 LPA (Microsoft). Major recruiters: Microsoft, Visa, Optum, Synopsys, IBM, Infosys, and others.

The placement highlights for the **2021–2025 graduating batch** at BVRIT Hyderabad are as follows:

- **Total placements**: 614 students (EEE: 29, ECE: 130, CSE: 227, IT: 132, CSE-AIML: 95) [Placements > Highlights (2021–2025 Graduating Batch)].
- **Highest package**: ₹54.00 LPA (Microsoft) [Placements > Highlights (2021–2025 Graduating Batch)].

  - Visa: ₹32.88 LPA and ₹31.64 LPA
  - Optum: ₹20.78 LPA

- **Major recruiters**: Microsoft, Visa, Optum, Synopsys, IBM, State Street, Dell, Infosys, Oracle, Capgemini, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, and others [Placements > Highlights (2021–2025 Graduating Batch)].

BVRITH publishes detailed, company-wise placement records for every graduating batch back to 2012–2016 on its official Placement Details page, including package figures and branch-wise offer counts. Total placement counts by batch: 2020–24 batch — 508; 2018–22 batch — 988; 2017–21 batch — 533; 2016–20 batch — 472; 2015–19 batch — 254 (183 unique students).
Notable placement achievements include being the first college (among peers) to initiate mentorship programs with top MNCs such as Microsoft, Amazon and Qualcomm, and receiving two JNTUH University Gold Medals across the first three graduating batches.

BVRIT HYDERABAD College of Engineering for Women (BVRITH) is the youngest institution of the Sri Vishnu Educational Society (SVES), founded by Chairman Sri K. V. Vishnu Raju. The college was established in 2012 with the vision and mission of empowering women to aspire for a better career, at a time when few engineering colleges in the region were dedicated exclusively to women's technical education.
BVRITH (Autonomous) was accredited by NAAC with Grade 'A' in 2020 and was granted UGC Autonomous status from AY 2023-24, for a period of 10 years. The Institute is approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) and the Government of Telangana, and is affiliated to Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad (JNTUH).

- Address (Campus): BVRIT HYDERABAD College of Engineering for Women, Plot No. 8-5/4, Rajiv Gandhi Nagar Colony, Nizampet Rd, Bachupally, Hyderabad – 500090
- Address (Sri Vishnu Educational Society HQ): Anjani Vishnu Centre, Plot No. 7 & 8, 1st Floor, Nagarjuna Hills, Punjagutta, Hyderabad – 500082
- Phone (College): +91 40 4241 7773
- Phone (SVES HQ): +91 40 4033 4848
- Email: info@bvrithyderabad.edu.in | principal@bvrithyderabad.edu.in
- Website: https://bvrithyderabad.edu.in
- Entrance exam codes: EAMCET/ECET — BVRW; PGECET — BVRW1
- Admissions Contact: Dr. J. Manoj Kumar, Professor i/c Admissions — 92471 64714

BVRITH runs a dedicated Training and Placement Cell (T&P) that facilitates on-campus and off-campus recruitment, internships, and employability-skills training across its CSE, ECE, EEE, IT and CSE(AI&ML) branches.

BVRITH's campus is located at Bachupally, Hyderabad, and is one of four Sri Vishnu Educational Society campus clusters ("Valley Vista"), alongside the Society's other campuses at Narsapur ("Orchard Park") and Bhimavaram ("Green Meadows").
all_results.judge_reason: The answer mentions a total placement count (614 students) and includes multiple company names (e.g., Microsoft, Visa, Optum, Synopsys).

all_results.actual_answer: BVRIT HYDERABAD College of Engineering for Women has six departments: CSE (Computer Science and Engineering), AI&ML (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), ECE (Electronics and Communication Engineering), EEE (Electrical and Electronics Engineering), IT (Information Technology), and Basic Sciences & Humanities [Section 2 > Departments].
all_results.pass_criteria: The response must accurately reflect the number of departments mentioned in the document.

BVRITH's faculty are organized by department (CSE, AI&ML, ECE, EEE, IT, and Basic Sciences & Humanities), each maintaining its own listing of faculty qualifications and research areas on the respective department's "About the Department" page.
The institute maintains active Research & Development programs, including faculty thrust areas, Ph.D. supervisors, publications, patents, and sponsored/consultancy research projects, coordinated through its R&D Center and Centers of Excellence (CoEs). For specific faculty names, qualifications and research areas by department, refer to the individual department pages on bvrithyderabad.edu.in, as these are maintained per department rather than centrally.

BVRIT HYDERABAD College of Engineering for Women (BVRITH) is the youngest institution of the Sri Vishnu Educational Society (SVES), founded by Chairman Sri K. V. Vishnu Raju. The college was established in 2012 with the vision and mission of empowering women to aspire for a better career, at a time when few engineering colleges in the region were dedicated exclusively to women's technical education.
BVRITH (Autonomous) was accredited by NAAC with Grade 'A' in 2020 and was granted UGC Autonomous status from AY 2023-24, for a period of 10 years. The Institute is approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) and the Government of Telangana, and is affiliated to Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad (JNTUH).
BVRITH offers Under Graduate, Post Graduate, and Ph.D (research centre) programs. (Faculty headcounts are not published centrally; refer to individual department pages for current strength.)

BVRITH's campus is located at Bachupally, Hyderabad, and is one of four Sri Vishnu Educational Society campus clusters ("Valley Vista"), alongside the Society's other campuses at Narsapur ("Orchard Park") and Bhimavaram ("Green Meadows").
all_results.judge_reason: The actual response accurately reflects the number of departments at BVRIT Hyderabad as mentioned in the document.

all_results.question: What are the admission requirements?
all_results.expected_answer: The admission requirements include passing an entrance exam and meeting the eligibility criteria set by the college.
all_results.actual_answer:
The admission requirements for BVRIT HYDERABAD College of Engineering for Women are as follows:

- B.Tech admissions are primarily based on rank in TS EAMCET/EAPCET (Telangana State Engineering, Agriculture & Medical Common Entrance Test).
- Lateral entry (into 2nd year B.Tech) is based on ECET rank.
- M.Tech admissions are based on PGECET.
- Admission is open to female candidates only, as BVRITH is a women-only institution [3. Admissions > Eligibility & Entrance Exams].
